definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="String" id="a">a</variable><variable type="String" id="b">b</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="variables_set_string"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:a</field><value name="VAL"><block type="custom_dependency_string"><field name="NAME">title</field></block></value><next><block type="variables_set_string"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:b</field><value name="VAL"><block type="custom_dependency_string"><field name="NAME">message</field></block></value><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">new AlertWindow(a, b).show();</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
